title: PCDN Social Change Career Podcast Livestream: Financial Gravity and Governance
summary: Eric Ries joins the PCDN Social Change Career Podcast for a livestream discussion on structural corruption, financial gravity, the Long-Term Stock Exchange, and how to become an incorruptible force for good.
blockquote: Success itself becomes a form of financial gravity, bending companies away from their original purpose. Eric reframes corporate governance not as bureaucracy or compliance, but as a creative and strategic act at the heart of building enduring, mission-controlled companies.
attribution_title: Professor, Social Entrepreneur; Host, PCDN Social Change Career Podcast
